availability_text: Only 14 left in stock (more on the way).
features: PEDI ROLLER - Foot files for hard skin electric are rechargeable pedicure tools that effortlessly remove tough calluses, cracked, dry skin, and rough areas safely. Say goodbye to unsightly and painful foot issues
2 SPEEDS AND 2 HEADS - This electric foot file hard skin remover features two speeds and two interchangeable course and fine heads. Customise your foot care routine to your specific needs.
LED LIGHT - Never miss a spot with the built-in LED light. This dead skin remover for feet ensures you work with precision, making it easier to carry out your at-home pedicure
ERGONOMIC DESIGN - The Paul Anthony SPA Pro Foot File is lightweight, compact, and ergonomically designed with a rechargeable battery

EASY TO USE - The hard skin remover foot, heels and toes is designed for ease of use. The easy-reach design allows for a more natural back-and-forth motion, making it a breeze to achieve salon-quality results at home
description: Product Description Rechargeable pedicure tool for smooth, beautiful feet Paul Anthony Pedi Roller is an at-home pedicure tool, so you can have smooth, more youthful-looking feet from the comfort of your own home. With its easy-reach design, you can reach around your heels, toes, sides, and balls of your feet. PLUS, the LED light lets you work with precision. The two speed controls means you can dial it up for tough areas, while the two replaceable treatment heads let you painlessly remove dry skin and calluses, then polish the area for a smooth finish and an easier, salon-perfect pedicure in just minutes. Right at home. Removes tough calluses, cracked dry skin, and rough areas safely Paul Anthony Pedi Roller is the perfect way to get a salon-looking finish on all that ugly, dry and dead skin that builds up on your feet over time. Calluses can be ugly, hard and even painful but, thanks to the amazing design and power of the Paul Anthony Pedi Roller, you can gently and safely remove layers of dead skin, lumps bumps and ridges, to leave your feet looking and feeling smooth and youthful without the time and cost of arranging an appointment at the pedicurist. Easy reach design for a more natural back-and-forth motion Paul Anthony Pedi Roller's streamlined design is like a magic wand angled to make it easier to reach difficult areas for perfect results. Many rollers and foot-treatment devices can be hard to use and even harder to get in just the right place and position to have the best effect on all that dead skin. The clever roller position lets you reach anywhere on your feet with perfect alignment, and also means you can use a natural 'back-and-forth' action to concentrate your efforts right where they're needed. PLUS, the lack of a cable or cord lets you twist, turn, bend and stretch to get at those calluses without wrapping yourself in cables or staying near a plug socket! Pack includes, 1x Paul Thony Pedi Roller 1x Smooth Roller 1x Rough Roller 1x Instruction Manual 1x USB Charging Cable Safety Warning Burn hazard: Avoid contact with skin. Electric shock risk: Keep away from water. Battery safety: Do not expose to extreme temperatures. Unplug when not in use. Do not leave unattended when plugged in. Keep out of reach of children.
